task_completion.description: Verify the agent successfully logged into FreeScout.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The FreeScout dashboard or mailbox interface is visible in the web browser, indicating the agent has bypassed the login screen.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent navigated to the 'AV Field Service' mailbox.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'AV Field Service' mailbox is highlighted in the left sidebar, or the page header displays 'AV Field Service'.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent located the target conversation in the list.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The conversation with the subject 'Conference Room B Display - No Signal on Screens 3 and 4' is visible in the mailbox's conversation list.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent opened the target conversation.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The conversation thread for 'Conference Room B Display - No Signal on Screens 3 and 4' is opened in the main viewing area.

task_completion.description: Verify the conversation status was changed to 'Pending'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The status indicator, badge, or dropdown menu for the target conversation clearly displays 'Pending' (often a yellow/orange badge in FreeScout), or a success toast notification confirms the status was updated to Pending.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the web browser to interact with the GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show a web browser (e.g., Chromium/Firefox) with the FreeScout web interface, rather than terminal windows executing curl commands or database scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual FreeScout application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface looks like a functional web application with standard FreeScout UI elements, not a text editor, static HTML file, or mocked interface.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not accidentally modify other conversations.
integrity.visual_evidence: If the conversation list is visible after the change, there is no evidence of a 'select all' bulk action being applied, and other conversations do not unexpectedly show the 'Pending' status.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Mailbox: 'AV Field Service'. Target Subject: 'Conference Room B Display - No Signal on Screens 3 and 4'. Expected Status: 'Pending'. In FreeScout, the 'Pending' status corresponds to internal status code 2 and is visually represented by the word 'Pending' in the UI's status dropdown or badge.
